case_study: Luo et al. LCA-TEA for UiO-66-NH2 production
route_or_system: Aqueous route versus conventional solvothermal route
other_key_metric: Aqueous-route UiO-66-NH2 outperformed amine-based capture in GWP only if sorbent loss stayed below 0.0017 t sorbent per t CO2 captured
notes: Highlights solvent choice, DMF avoidance, and durability as central sustainability levers.

case_study: Goh et al. integrated LCA-TEA for membrane materials
route_or_system: Solvent-free UiO-66-NH2 route compared with less favourable alternatives
other_key_metric: Shows that greener MOF synthesis matters even when UiO-66 is only a membrane filler component
notes: Supports route-specific inventory treatment for UiO-66-based membranes.

case_study: Agola and Taddei PET-derived linker route
route_or_system: Water-based UiO-66 synthesis from terephthalate esters derived from PET recycling
other_key_metric: 50-fold scale-up; space-time yield exceeding 200 kg m-3 d-1
notes: Promising circular route, but the paper stresses that PET origin alone does not prove better life-cycle performance.

case_study: Gebremariam et al. structured UiO-66 V/PSA
route_or_system: Structured UiO-66 in cyclic V/PSA scheme
other_key_metric: Estimated capture cost around US$72.5 per tonne CO2 captured at 95% purity and 88.8% recovery for one operating point
notes: Paper uses this to argue that shaped, process-relevant forms matter more than powder metrics alone.
